title: Grammatophyllum rumphianum
taxonomy: Grammatophyllum rumphianum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Grammatophyllum and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. This epiphytic orchid is characterized by its large, plicate leaves and a robust, monopodial stem. The classification of Grammatophyllum rumphianum is further supported by its distinctive inflorescence and fragrant flowers. Through its classification, this species is recognized as a notable member of the orchid family, known for its striking appearance and unique characteristics.
